source_jobs.title: Marketing Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GRVT



GRVT is the only exchange architected on its own yield-generating, tokenized deposit layer — where every dollar is instantly transformed into a productive, yield-bearing asset. Capital compounds continuously across trading, investing, and spending, without ever leaving self-custody or going idle.



Where traditional exchanges force a tradeoff between yield generation and capital deployment, GRVT eliminates that constraint entirely. Tokenized deposits function simultaneously as margin, yield instruments, and liquidity primitives — compounding across the full lifecycle of capital, from fiat on-ramp to perpetuals trading, institutional vaults, and real-world spending.



Built on a dedicated privacy chain powered by zkSync Prividium, GRVT delivers CEX-grade performance with on-chain settlement — fully self-custodial by design. The company is founded by alumni from Goldman Sachs, Meta, and DBS.




What You’ll Do

 - Conceptualize, create, and adapt day-to-day digital and static assets across all marketing channels (e.g. social media, newsletters, presentations, and ads)

 - Design marketing, PR, and BD materials across digital, social, and web: from campaign templates to decks and motion assets

 - Be responsible for crafting and maintaining high-quality graphic treatments for the GRVT brand

 - Continuously push the creative boundaries and test new formats with a focus on performance

 - Create engaging motion graphics to support marketing campaigns, feature launches, and brand storytelling

 - Leverage AI tools to rapidly ideate, produce, and iterate creative assets, including images, videos, animations, and content concepts

 - Build scalable AI-powered creative workflows, templates, and frameworks that enable marketing, community, product, and other teams to create content more effectively

 - Experiment with emerging AI tools and identify opportunities to improve creative quality, speed, and output across the organization

 - Document and share AI best practices, prompts, and processes to help establish a culture of AI-native content creation

 - Work efficiently and proactively to deliver high-quality outputs on schedule, even in fast-moving environments

 - Own specific timelines and graphic deliverables with minimal supervision

 - Support event and partnership campaigns with on-brand creative assets

 - Maintain and evolve Grvt’s marketing design system

 - Stay on top of design trends in Web3, AI, tech, and lifestyle to keep the brand fresh and relevant

Other Exciting exposures

 - Propose graphic ideas to storytell our brand and product

 - Explore motion design, 3D visuals, and AI-generated video formats

 - Pioneer new creative formats using generative AI, automation, and emerging content tools

 - Help establish Grvt’s internal AI creative toolkit and workflows

 
 

Requirements

 - Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects preferred)

 - Confident in After Effects — keyframing, typography, transitions, pacing

 - Strong understanding of generative AI tools for design, video, content creation, and creative automation (e.g. Midjourney, Runway, Veo, ChatGPT, Claude, Flux, etc.)

 - Demonstrated ability to use AI to create production-ready creative assets, not just concepts

 - Experience building repeatable workflows, prompt systems, templates, or creative frameworks that others can adopt

 - Ability to move fast, take feedback, and deliver high-quality work under tight timelines

 - A sharp eye for typography, layout, color, and visual storytelling

 - Curious, experimental, and constantly exploring new creative technologies

 - Welcome junior candidates with 1 year of experience

source_jobs.title: BD Executive/Senior BD (Japanese speaking)
source_jobs.description:
✅ Key Responsibilities

 1. Onboarding KOLs & Communities – Identify, engage, negotiate with, and onboard trader KOLs, trading communities, and professional traders to promote and utilize our exchange.

 2. Partnership Development – Build and maintain strong relationships with traders, signal groups, and crypto communities to encourage ongoing platform usage.

 3. Outreach & Negotiation – Conduct cold outreach and manage partnership discussions with potential collaborators.

 4. Growth Initiatives – Support the design and execution of referral, rebate, and promotional programs to attract and retain traders.

 5. Market Research – Stay up to date on crypto trends, competitor exchanges, and rising KOLs or trading communities.

 6. Cross-Team Collaboration – Coordinate with Marketing, Product, and Customer Support teams to ensure a smooth onboarding experience and sustained engagement.

 7. Performance Monitoring – Track, analyze, and report the effectiveness of partnerships, including user acquisition and engagement metrics.
    
    

👤 Qualifications & Skills

 - 2–5+ years of experience in Business Development, Sales, or Partnerships, preferably in crypto, fintech, or influencer marketing.

 - Solid understanding of crypto trading, exchange ecosystems, and KOL dynamics.

 - Active presence or strong familiarity with platforms like Twitter, Telegram, and Discord.

 - Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship-building abilities.

 - Self-motivated with a hunter mindset — comfortable with cold outreach and closing deals.

 - language proficiency, especially for engaging with Japanese-speaking users, partners, or communities



🚀 Nice to Have:

 - Existing network or working relationships with KOLs, professional traders, or crypto community leaders.

source_jobs.title: Senior Data & BI Analyst
source_jobs.description:
🌍 Location: Singapore (Full-Time, Hybrid/Remote Friendly)
📩 Reports to: CEO



🎯 Key Responsibilities

1. Company-Wide Performance Intelligence

 - Build and own the central performance dashboard across all GRVT divisions (Trading, Marketing, BD, Product, Operations).

 - Create and maintain KPI frameworks that link every department’s goals to company revenue and growth targets.

 - Generate weekly and monthly CEO reports with clear narratives — what’s working, what’s not, and where to allocate resources.
   

2. Strategy & Insight Generation

 - Analyze company performance and identify growth levers.

 - Conduct deep dives into metrics like P&L, conversion funnels, and user retention

 - Develop data-backed forecasts and scenarios (volume, revenue, user growth, liquidity).

 - Turn findings into strategic recommendations that shape company direction.
   

3. KPI Setting & ROI Evaluation

 - Define and track KPIs for marketing efficiency, BD ROI, and partner venue performance.

 - Measure impact of every campaign, BD partnership, and feature launch — and recommend optimization levers.

 - Build ROI models for decision-making on partnerships, vendors, and budgets.
   

4. Data Infrastructure & Automation

 - Set up the data foundation for the company, pipelines, databases, dashboards, and analytics tools (e.g., BigQuery, Looker, Metabase, Mixpanel).

 - Build and maintain SQL queries and data models directly, minimizing dependency on engineers.

 - Design self-serve data systems for teams to access accurate and unified data.
   
   

💡 Job Requirements

 - 4-8 years of experience in data analytics, strategy, or business intelligence roles within fintech, crypto, or top-tier tech (e.g., Revolut, Binance, Stripe, Uber).

 - Highly skilled in SQL, with the ability to independently query and model data.

 - Proficient in Python/R and BI tools such as Superset, PowerBI, Looker, or Metabase.

 - Strong grasp of financial modeling, P&L analysis, and business metrics — able to connect data to outcomes.

 - Experienced in OKR setting, KPI management, and performance tracking across teams.

 - Excellent communicator who can simplify complex data into executive-level insights.

 - A hands-on builder who thrives in a fast-moving startup environment.

 - Bonus: Familiarity with crypto, trading, or on-chain analytics.



📈 What Success Looks Like

 - A real-time data control center empowers the CEO and leadership team.

 - All divisions operate with quantifiable goals and transparent ROI.

 - Company OKRs and KPIs are rooted in measurable, outcome-driven metrics.

 - Insights from the Data & Insights team directly shape strategy, capital allocation, and growth initiatives.

notes: GRVT is a fintech startup with a focus on yield-generating, tokenized deposit layer.
